positive: A stylized cosmic guardian silhouette, standing majestically among constellations and nebulae. The guardian has flowing robes and an ethereal energy emanating from its core, rendered in a vibrant sapphire and deep indigo palette with luminous gold accents. The scene should feature geometric, abstract star patterns and crystalline formations emerging from cosmic dust. The overall composition is symmetrical and centered, creating a strong, impactful figure suitable for chest print placement. High contrast, clean edges, crisp vector art aesthetic, celestial map style, perfect for apparel printing.
